{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Class One Fiends
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Class One Fiends]] are held in [[Asylum]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]] was uniquely able to handle [[Class One Fiends]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
